response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development and tooling, but his background is heavily skewed toward web, mobile, and embedded systems rather than enterprise Java/Kotlin IDE tooling. While he demonstrates strong technical skills in multiple languages, his lack of explicit experience with JVM internals, IDE development, or enterprise frameworks like Spring limits his immediate fit. However, his history of building developer tooling (e.g., MCP code generators, test frameworks) and his interest in IDE internals suggest potential adaptability.
strengths: Strong background in developer tooling and IDE-like systems (e.g., MCP code generators, test frameworks)
Experience with enterprise-grade systems and high-performance applications (e.g., micro-services infrastructure, low-latency apps)
Proven ability to learn new languages and tools quickly (e.g., JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, Java)
concerns: Limited direct experience with JVM internals, Kotlin, or enterprise Java frameworks (e.g., Spring)
No explicit mention of IDE development or language tooling in past roles
Background is heavily skewed toward web/mobile development rather than enterprise IDE tooling
